seoTitle: Fumina vs Fumina South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fumina and Fumina South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fumina vs Fumina South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fumina and Fumina South.
heading: Fumina vs Fumina South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fumina, Victoria and Fumina South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fumina has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Fumina South (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fumina or Fumina South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fumina has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Fumina South scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fumina scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Fumina South scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fumina or Fumina South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fumina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
